extensionDescription.message: Converts clickbaits headlines on news sites to better match the article contents

clickbaitinessLabel Not Clickbait at all.description: Label for the not clickbait at all title 'type' or 'severity'

clickbaitinessLabel Slightly Clickbaity.description: Label for the slightly clickbaity title 'type' or 'severity'

clickbaitinessLabel Moderately Clickbait.description: Label for the moderately clickbaity title 'type' or 'severity'

clickbaitinessLabel Very Clickbaity.description: Label for the very clickbaity title 'type' or 'severity'

clickbaitinessLabel Extremely Clickbaity.description: Label for the extremely clickbaity title 'type' or 'severity'

siteTitleProcessingNotSupported.description: Message to show in 'main' title element when the visited site is not supported for processing

siteTitleProcessingDisabled.description: Message to show in 'main' title element when the visited site is disabled in settings

siteTitleError.description: Message to show in 'main' title element when there was an unexpected error processing the site

statsErrorUserFixInstructions.message: Failed to load site data. Try refreshing the page
statsErrorUserFixInstructions.description: Instruction text to show in the bottom of 'main' view to help user with an unexpected error

statsviewHeader.description: Title of the statistics view section

statsviewGroupedByClickbaitinessLabelCli.description: Title of the stats section clickbaitiness grouping table for the 'type' or 'severity' of clickbait

statsviewGroupedByClickbaitinessLabelAmo.description: Title of the stats section clickbaitiness grouping table for the amount of this type of clickbait

statsviewGroupedByClickbaitinessLabelTot.description: Title of the stats section clickbaitiness grouping table for the total amount of converted titles

feedbackviewGeneralFeedbackHeader.description: Title of the feedback view general feedback section

feedbackviewGeneralFeedbackLoading.description: Text marking that the embedded generic feedback form is still loading in to the document

feedbackviewRateTitleHeader.description: Title of the feedback view aligned headline rating section

feedbackviewRateTitleOriginalTitleLabel.description: Text marking the original headline on the feedback view aligned headline rating section

feedbackviewRateTitleConvertedTitleLabel.description: Text marking the aligned headline on the feedback view aligned headline rating section

feedbackviewRateTitleConversionIsGood.description: Text on the button in the feedback view aligned headline rating that the user can rate the alignment as 'good'

feedbackviewRateTitleConversionIsBad.description: Text on the button in the feedback view aligned headline rating that the user can rate the alignment as 'bad'

feedbackviewNoConversions.message: No aligned headlines on this page.
feedbackviewNoConversions.description: Message displayed when there are no aligned clickbaits on the current page

feedbackviewCurrentPageLabel.description: Label indicating that the conversion is for the active page itself

feedbackviewReportIssueBtn.description: Label for the button that opens the issue reporting form

feedbackviewReportCommentPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for comments in reporting form

feedbackviewReportSubmitBtn.description: Label for submit button in reporting form

feedbackviewReportCancelBtn.description: Label for cancel button in reporting form

settingsviewSitesEnabledTitle.description: Title of the settings view enabled sites section

settingsviewStatusTitle.description: Title of the settings view status section

settingsviewMasterSwitchLabel.description: Label of the settings view master switch toggle

navigationMainLabel.description: Label of the navigation menu main view button

navigationFeedbackLabel.description: Label of the navigation menu feedback view button

navigationSettingsLabel.description: Label of the navigation menu settings view button

devmodeHiddenButtonTitle.description: Title-attribute of the hidden devmode activation button

devmodeCopyLinkSignaturesTitle.message: Copy link signatures on this site to your clipboard
devmodeCopyLinkSignaturesTitle.description: Title-attribute of the hidden devmode link signature copying button

devmodeSetDebugVisualsLabel.description: Label of the devmode debug visuals toggle

devmodeDumpLinkHashLabel.description: Label for the devmode dump signatures section

devmodeDumpLinkHashBtn.description: Button text to copy link signatures to clipboard

devmodeSetTitleDataUrlLabel.description: Label for the devmode title data source URL select dropdown

settingsviewDevmodeTitle.description: Title of the settings view developer mode section

settingsviewDatabaseStatusTitle.description: Title of the settings view database status section

databaseLastUpdated.description: Text showing when the database was last updated

databaseNeverUpdated.description: Text showing when the database has never been updated

databaseUpdateBtn.description: Text on the button to update database

databaseUpdateBtnUpdating.description: Text on the database update button when update is in progress

settingsviewClickbaitLevelTitle.description: Title of the settings view clickbait level section

clickbaitLevel0Title.description: Title for clickbait level 0 (Not Clickbait at all)

clickbaitLevel0Desc.message: Process all headlines, including neutral ones
clickbaitLevel0Desc.description: Description for clickbait level 0 (Not Clickbait at all)
